auth_notes: Requires an API Key or Bearer Token passed in the Authorization header. Some endpoints require an Account ID to be passed as a query parameter or within the URL path.
rate_limits: Varies by plan; typically 1-5 requests per second for REST endpoints.
gotchas: Floating point precision issues when handling currency values in JavaScript/n8n
Market data is often delayed unless using a premium/pro tier
Strict IP whitelisting is often required for production API keys
research_notes: Integration must be built using the HTTP Request node. Authentication should be configured via 'Header Auth' or 'Predefined Credential Type'. Since financial data is involved, it is recommended to use the 'Split Into Batches' node when fetching large trade histories to avoid timeout issues.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration must be built using the HTTP Request node. Authentication should be configured via 'Header Auth' or 'Predefined Credential Type'. Since financial data is involved, it is recommended to use the 'Split Into Batches' node when fetching large trade histories to avoid timeout issues.
